seoTitle: Wangaratta vs Wangaratta South — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Wangaratta and Wangaratta South. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Wangaratta vs Wangaratta South: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Wangaratta and Wangaratta South.
heading: Wangaratta vs Wangaratta South — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Wangaratta, Victoria and Wangaratta South, Victoria. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Wangaratta South has a lower overall climate risk score (30/100) compared to Wangaratta (40/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Wangaratta or Wangaratta South safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Wangaratta has a flood risk score of 37/100, while Wangaratta South scores 22/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Wangaratta scores 60/100 for bushfire risk. Wangaratta South scores 27/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Wangaratta or Wangaratta South?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Wangaratta South has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.52% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
